creator: jaapb@kerguelen.org
text:
On 12/31/2011 9:47 PM, Michael Scheidell wrote:
> miwi:
>
> it looks like maintainer added a patch to this in
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/163717
>
> Jaap: is this what you meant to do?

> would you really have meant to add this patch to 163276 ?
>
> would you want me to close 163717 so that miwi can apply additional 
> patch in 163717 to the existing pr 163276?

Not quite, 163717 is a patch to ocaml-react that keeps ocaml-lwt from 
compiling (it's a dependency). So the patch 163717 should be applied to 
devel/ocaml-react, whereas 163276 is an upgrade for devel/ocaml-lwt.

Sorry for the confusion,

   Jaap
